PLAINTIFF ROBERT BOLEYN'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement: GRANTED. Order re preliminary approval and notice of pendency are signed. (301/JLW/EM-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Compendium Of Federal Authorities In Support Of Motion; Feder, Kitchin And Fogel Declarations;

Patrick R. Kitchin, Esq. (415) 677-9058 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Boleyn
Jospeh Liburt, Esq., Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe (650) 614-7447 for Defendant The Gap Inc.
RULING:
HEARING HELD: PLAINTIFF ROBERT BOLEYN'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is appropriate and is approved; the Court approves the designation of Robert Boleyn as the class representative. Further Hearing Re: Class Action Settlement is CONTINUED to 02/04/05 in Dept. 301; Counsel shall submit to the Court the addendum and proposed notice no later than 10 AM on 02/03/05. Hearing on Final Approval of the Class Action Settlement is set for 05/31/05 in Dept. 301. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EM-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
